design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate horizontally scrolling space, dodge/weave through bullet patterns, manage three-weapon loadout with smart bomb mechanic, upgrade weapons via pickups while maintaining persistent health across levels
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing movement speed (three speed tiers) to either avoid hazards entirely or weave through tight bullet patterns; weapon management tension between keeping equipped weapons vs. grabbing new ones
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Piloting an experimental fighter (A-144 Phalanx) as an ace pilot investigating alien invasion, with agency over tactical weapon loadout and movement style
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unusually generous for its era: persistent health across levels (3 HP system), ability to hold and swap three weapons freely, smart bomb sacrifice mechanic to avoid slot waste, variable speed control for pattern adaptation. This emphasizes player agency and tactical choice over memorization.

difficulty.lives_system: Traditional lives system with persistent 3 HP health pool that carries between levels; health restored via P-type Power Capsule pickups
difficulty.checkpointing: Level-based progression with health persistence across levels
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Three difficulty levels selectable in options menu (affects enemy bullet frequency); hidden 'Funny' difficulty accessible via cheat codes for dramatically escalated challenge; three speed tiers always available for real-time pattern adaptation

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon upgrade system: five main weapon types (Laser, Homing, Energizer, Ricochet, missiles A/B/C) with successive power levels gained by collecting matching pickups. Up to three weapons stored simultaneously. Health restoration via P-type capsules. 'Extent' score milestone set at 300,000 points.
progression.unlock_mechanism: Weapons obtained from defeated enemies; hidden 'Funny' difficulty via cheat codes
replayability_hooks: Three difficulty levels encourage replays at different challenge thresholds
Weapon variety (5 main types with upgrades) enables different tactical approaches
Persistent health system rewards skillful play across multiple levels

world_building_techniques: Opening premise: year 2279, planetary research on alien world Delia, emergency transmission about hazardous leak
Player role: Wink Baufield (Rick in GBA), ace pilot investigating alien bioship possession of planetary fighters
Operation codename 'Climax' frames the mission context

faction_indicators: Player as security force ace pilot vs. unknown alien bioship squadron
danger_signals: Emergency transmission from research colony on alien planet
Unidentified alien bioship threat appearing suddenly
Possession/control of human fighter craft by alien entities
environmental_storytelling: Alien planet Delia setting with colonization infrastructure
Progressive encounter with increasingly powerful alien bioship variants
Space-based combat zones reflecting orbital and planetary defense scenarios
